examples: If you are lactose intolerant, you might want to try lactase supplements.
Sweden has one of the world's highest percentages of lactase tolerant people.
Lactose intolerance stems from a deficiency of the enzyme lactase, which is needed to help digest lactose, a sugar in milk.
All mammals can digest lactose sugars in milk as babies, but the lactase gene switches off at weaning when no longer needed.
This "lactase persistence" is caused by one of four genetic mutations that occurred in different regions and at different dates, one in Europe and three in Africa.
